summary: Fixed Gemini 429/503 pipeline bug. callGemini now throws RATE_LIMIT_REACHED on 429/503 and on RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED/error.code 429; isJobListingEmail precheck re-throws RATE_LIMIT_REACHED (and other API failures) instead of returning false, so emails are queued via markEmailAsRateLimited instead of silently archived as no-jobs. Root cause of empty-sheet + lost-emails resolved. TDD RED-first; 10 new tests. Oscar WARN (ernie/telly/zoe all PASS).
next: WARN-21 deferred (test {success:true,response:undefined} returns false). WARN-20 still open. NOT yet clasp pushed — Kermit/user handles deploy.
